title: alyssum montanum subvar. molliusculum
intro: Alyssum montanum subvar. molliusculum, also known as Mountain Sweet Alyssum, is a perennial herb belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence. The health benefits of Mountain Sweet Alyssum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to soothe respiratory issues and promote wound healing. Mountain Sweet Alyssum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine.
